description: Web surface attack preconditions. HTTP/HTTPS/Onion targets. Technology fingerprinting, exposed admin interfaces, auth surface, TLS misconfigs, header leakage, path exposure, CVE-mapped version detection.

WB-01.label: web_reachable
WB-01.description: Web target reachable, returns a response
WB-01.evidence_hint: HTTP GET to root URL returns any status code

WB-02.label: server_version_leaked
WB-02.description: Server header discloses software name and version

WB-03.label: stack_leaked
WB-03.description: X-Powered-By or similar header discloses technology stack

WB-04.label: security_headers_absent
WB-04.description: Response missing critical security headers (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options)

WB-05.label: admin_interface_exposed
WB-05.description: Admin or management interface accessible without authentication

WB-09.label: env_file_exposed
WB-09.description: .env or config file with credentials accessible

WB-10.label: default_credentials
WB-10.description: Application uses default or well-known credentials
WB-10.evidence_hint: Successful auth with admin:admin, admin:password, vendor defaults

WB-11.label: tls_weak_or_missing
WB-11.description: TLS not enforced, weak protocol, or certificate expired/expiring
WB-11.evidence_hint: HTTP only, TLS 1.0/1.1, or cert NotAfter in past or within 30 days

WB-13.label: cve_version_match
WB-13.description: Server version matches a known CVE pattern

WB-14.label: auth_surface_present
WB-14.evidence_hint: HTTP 401/403 or login form at standard auth paths

WB-15.label: cms_detected
WB-15.evidence_hint: wp-content, Drupal.settings, Joomla! in body or headers

WB-16.label: onion_service_active
WB-16.description: Target is an onion service accessible via Tor

WB-17.label: sensitive_path_exposed
WB-17.description: Sensitive file path accessible (backup, sql dump, private key)

WB-18.label: redirect_chain_present
WB-18.description: Multiple redirects — potential open redirect or routing misconfig
WB-18.evidence_hint: More than 2 redirects in chain to final URL

web_initial_access_v1.label: Web Initial Access
web_initial_access_v1.description: Exploit exposed web surface for initial access

web_credential_exposure_v1.label: Web Credential Exposure
web_credential_exposure_v1.description: Extract credentials from exposed web configuration

web_info_disclosure_v1.label: Web Information Disclosure
web_info_disclosure_v1.description: Gather intelligence from exposed headers and endpoints
